title: Twilight Reading
description: Narrative sentences for expressive reading practice.

sentences.english: The quiet street looked different under the pale evening light.
sentences.chinese: 在苍白的暮光下，那条安静的街道显得有些不同。

sentences.english: She took a breath before answering, as if every word mattered.
sentences.chinese: 她回答前吸了一口气，仿佛每个词都很重要。

sentences.english: For a moment, the room was filled with a silence that felt almost alive.
sentences.chinese: 有那么一刻，房间里充满了一种几乎像有生命的沉默。
